tool_usage_and_best_practices.overview: Guidelines for using tools effectively during JDBC connector creation and best practices to ensure successful connector development.

pattern.name: reading_template_files
pattern.description: Always read DSL-jdbc.json template before creating new DSL
pattern.rationale: Understanding the template structure ensures you create valid DSL files with all required fields and proper JSON syntax.

pattern.name: creating_dsl_files
pattern.description: Create DSL files with complete, valid JSON content

best_practices.practice: Use proper JSON formatting with correct indentation
Remove all _comment, _example, and _note fields from final DSL
